description:
Open-source local web development environment for Windows.

Hangar is a single-binary Windows app that gives you Apache, Nginx, MySQL, PostgreSQL, multiple PHP versions, Node, Mailpit, mkcert SSL, a built-in DNS server for *.test domains, and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. An open-source alternative to XAMPP, WAMP, and Laragon.

Hangar is the first PHP and database stack manager with first-class AI tool integration: connect Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-capable agent and let it manage services, run SQL, audit schemas, and toggle SSL on your behalf.

Features include one-click service management, multi-version PHP switchable per project, auto-generated vhosts, local HTTPS via embedded mkcert, a built-in DNS server, a server-side database auditor that emits runnable SQL migration files, and a unified launcher for phpMyAdmin, HeidiSQL, DBeaver, VS Code, PocketBase, and Mailpit.
Initial public release of Hangar.

- One-click service management for Apache, Nginx, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Mailpit.
- Multi-version PHP (7.3, 8.1-8.5), switchable globally or per project.
- Project manager with auto-generated vhosts, hosts-file entries, per-vhost logs.
- Local HTTPS via embedded mkcert.
- Built-in DNS server for *.test domains.
- MCP server on 127.0.0.1:3742 exposing 14 tools for AI agents.
- Server-side database auditor that emits a runnable .sql migration file.
- Installed launcher for bundled tools (phpMyAdmin, HeidiSQL, DBeaver, VS Code, PocketBase, Mailpit).
